goals: Discover what types of unit conversions are available
Explore units in a category relevant to research data or scientific measurement
Perform specific conversions to understand scale or compare measurements

user_agent_config.personality: Wealthy patron interested in scientific research, curious about technical details but not an expert
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands general concepts but doesn't know specific unit names or conversion formulas

end_condition: The user has learned about available conversion capabilities and performed at least one useful conversion
